ctxMarket: Attention is on Solana’s growing role in real-world asset (RWA) tokenization and the launch of tokenized SpaceX stock. Despite strong ETF inflows and increased DeFi activity, Solana’s price is underperforming compared to Bitcoin and Ethereum.
ctxTalking:
• Solana’s RWA base surpassed $2.5B, challenging Ethereum’s lead in this sector
• Tokenized SpaceX stock is debuting on Solana alongside its Nasdaq listing
• A Raydium exploit highlighted risks in forgotten DeFi contracts
ctxMatters: Solana’s expanding RWA and ETF activity signals institutional and mainstream interest. The SpaceX stock tokenization bridges traditional finance and blockchain, broadening asset access. The Raydium exploit underscores ongoing security challenges in legacy DeFi infrastructure.
ctxSignal:
Signal: Growth in Solana’s RWA sector and ETF inflows; launch of major tokenized equities.
Noise: Short-term price moves not matching underlying activity and inflows.
ctxGlossary:
RWA — Real-world assets represented as tokens on a blockchain
ETF — Exchange-traded fund, a regulated investment product tradable on stock exchanges

readMore.title: Understanding why the RWA race is no longer Ethereum’s to control
The next DeFi drain could come from legacy contracts everyone forgot
SpaceX stock is coming to Solana on the same day it lists on Nasdaq
